creator: robtone@ek-muc.de
text:
On Mon, May 05, 2008 at 02:14:42AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/postfix-policyd-weight,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/123411 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123411


Patch approved.

    Robert Felber (PGP: 896CF30B)
